The Four Chambers of Care

One heart.
Four chambers.

Like the heart itself, our care moves through four chambers — each one essential, each one connected.

Select a chamber to explore
I.

Prevention

Programs tailored to address and modify your specific risk factors — reducing to a minimum the likelihood of threatening cardiovascular events, so you can enjoy the highest quality of life.

Risk AssessmentLipid ManagementLifestyle Medicine
II.

Diagnosis

Using advanced diagnostic technology, we uncover the insights that help protect your heart for years to come — because care begins with understanding.

EchocardiographyStress TestingVascular Imaging
III.

Intervention

Board-certified interventional cardiologists delivering the most advanced treatment and therapy — a personalized, multi-disciplinary approach to cardiac and vascular disease.

Interventional CardiologyVascular Procedures
IV.

Recovery

From recovery through secondary prevention, we minimize the potential of recurring complications — and help you live the life you love.

Cardiac RehabSecondary PreventionThe Fit Collective

Michigan Locations
Our Mission

"In the heart of Michigan, care begins with understanding."

At Cardiovascular Consultants, our specialists take the time to listen, guide, and create a plan built for you. Using advanced diagnostic technology, we uncover the insights that help protect your heart for years to come.

From prevention to recovery, we're here to help you live the life you love. Your heart deserves the best — and in Michigan, the best is here.

Start the Conversation
